Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm in Shinagawa Dungeon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya is walking nearby.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}i'm not even complaining today or ne thing... so rare =P[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}but i have to tell tatsu cuz he's my MMO partner! i'll be brave ;_;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}...im so lame! im blushing 4 reals!![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}oh noes... now im starting to get sweaty =/[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems surprised.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems to be having fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}i wanted to tell u last time but i chickened out... ::blush::[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems to be embarrassed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}im kinda..."interested" in sum1 from school ＞_＞;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}he's kinda a student tho xD[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}none of the male teachers r even in my league, so i gave up looking for b/fs @ work -_-;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}i never thought i'd fall for a student! @w@;;;;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}thats kinda crazy even for me ＞_＞;[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}{f 5 13 10 5 1}hmm... he's kinda quiet, but real mature & intense looking (and hawt) ;P[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}i luuuuuuv this one emo face he makes sumtimes... who needs food & water when i got that 8D[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}errmmm... i know there's an age diff, & he doesn't have a job or ne thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems conflicted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}sumtimes stuff sounds better in ur head than it is in real life. maybe its a bad idea =/[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}he's one of my own students actually ^^;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}he lives in a dorm cuz his parents passed away :c jus transferred in this year[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}mebbe i can pull some strings to talk to him 1 on 1 ＞_＞ i AM his homeroom teacher...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}oh btw, u dun needta be jealous. its jus a lil crush, ok?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}tatsuya is the only game partner for maya ^^; no worries[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can tell that Maya cares about me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми стали ближчими...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}i havent made my appt yet, but imma go to a salon *_*[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun will be head over heels for me the next time he sees me ＜33333[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}alrighty tatsuya, i gtg. lets think positive![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya's player signed off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to log out as well.[n]{f 1 1}
